segments.text: Hello, greetings, I am Dr. Meera Bhas calling from Tata AIG Insurance. Can I speak with Suman Yadav ji?
segments.speaker: doctor

segments.text: Would you prefer to speak in Hindi, or should I call you in another language?
segments.speaker: doctor

segments.text: Yes, ma'am, actually, I am outside, I'm currently on a bus.
segments.speaker: customer

segments.text: Okay, so at what time can we call you?
segments.speaker: doctor

segments.text: After 3 PM, okay. We will call you after 3 PM.
segments.speaker: doctor

segments.text: I'll call. Should I call on the same number?
segments.speaker: customer

segments.text: No, you cannot. This is a company-initiated call, so you will receive a call from us. Okay?
segments.speaker: doctor
